objective: Turn the captured mobile web screenshot baseline into an executable native App Store, Google Play, and domestic Android screenshot handoff once Android/iOS builds are available.

officialBasis.name: Apple screenshot specifications
requirements: iPhone 6.9 inch portrait accepted sizes include 1260x2736, 1290x2796, and 1320x2868.
iPhone 6.5 inch portrait accepted sizes include 1242x2688 and 1284x2778.
Use real app screenshots for submitted app versions.

officialBasis.name: Google Play preview asset guidelines
requirements: Screenshots must be JPEG or 24-bit PNG without alpha.
Screenshots must have a minimum dimension of 320px and a maximum dimension of 3840px.
For apps, provide at least four screenshots with minimum 1080px resolution, using 9:16 portrait or 16:9 landscape.

baselineRules: Use current web captures only as layout and story baseline.
Final store assets must be recaptured from native Android/iOS builds.
Do not show local filesystem paths, TODO URLs, secrets, private customer data, or unreleased legal text.

preCaptureGates: iOS project opens on macOS with Xcode.
Signing or simulator launch is validated.
Review account is seeded or review-safe sample state is available.
Legal/support pages contain final production text.
Use only if 6.9 inch screenshots are not provided or store console asks for fallback assets.
Match the same scenes and locale as the 6.9 inch set.

dimensionRules: Maximum side cannot be more than twice the minimum side.
Use 9:16 portrait or 16:9 landscape for recommendation eligibility.
captureSets.captureDevice: Android phone or emulator from release build
preCaptureGates: Android SDK and JDK 17+ are configured.
Release or review-safe debug build installs on Android.
Review account is seeded or review-safe sample state is available.
No debug banners, local URLs, or developer-only text are visible.

captureSets.captureDevice: Android phone or emulator from release build
preCaptureGates: Confirm ICP and APP filing display policy.
Confirm Chinese store listing copy and privacy materials.

sceneMap.title: 创建 AI 视频任务
隐私、支持与账号数据
mustShow: Data export and account deletion entry

manualCaptureSteps: Run npm run release:check and confirm only owner/toolchain/production warnings remain.
Seed review-safe data with npm run review:seed after real review credentials exist.
Build and install the native Android or iOS app.
Open the same scene order: home, create, assets, settings.
Capture native screenshots at accepted store sizes.
Place files in the target output folder using 01-home.png, 02-create.png, 03-assets.png, 04-settings.png.
Verify no local paths, TODO values, secrets, private customer data, or misleading marketing overlays are visible.
Update store/screenshot-plan.json set status from blocked/manual-ready to captured only after native assets exist.
